steps.title: Contrast expectation and result
steps.content: Researchers expected G47's magnetic field to resemble the more uniform fields seen in other galactic bones. Instead, the map showed no clear pattern or direction.

steps.title: Reject unsupported surprises
steps.content:
• Choice A: The passage never mentions magnetic field strength.
  • Choice B: It does not say earlier mappings were inaccurate.
  • Choice C: Similar measurements were expected, not surprising.

steps.title: Name the unexpected pattern
steps.content: The surprising finding was that G47's magnetic field lacked the uniform pattern researchers had expected. The answer is D.
